markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the new Arena Community product and website launch, provide context on the company's background and goals, and align on next steps for SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Arena is launching a new website and "Arena Community" product - an all-in-one solution to help companies build communities on their own websites](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The goal is to move audiences away from social media to company websites for better monetization and first-party data](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Arena's infrastructure can handle large traffic spikes, differentiating it from individual creator platforms like Circle](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [The team will provide access to paid ads data to inform the SEO/content keyword strategy](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Topics

### New Website and Arena Community Product

  - [Shifting to a modern dark mode design while maintaining credibility](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Main components: AI-powered content feed, live blogs, group chat, user-generated threads](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Focus on monetization through ads and potential e-commerce integration](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Using structured data and SEO techniques to improve site's ranking](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### Company Background and Goals

  - [Founded in 2018 to move audiences to company websites from social media](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Initial products were live blogs and group chat widgets](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Now building an all-in-one community solution after raising Series A](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Targeting media publishers, entertainment, sports, e-commerce companies](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Similar value prop to Circle and Sphere for hosting communities](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [But Arena is a white-label version embedded on client's website](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Allows better SEO, handling traffic spikes, monetization integration](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Set up a product demo/walkthrough with the Arena team](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Provide access to paid ads data and top converting keywords](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Start building out the keyword research/content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Set up an Airtable base to manage the SEO workflow](https://fathom.video/share/R3szMLzrhmJNW_XSNFPj1y_bQzb7aox_?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
